title: Selling Plugins Without a Payment Processor: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Are you a digital creator from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or Pakistan, trying to sell plugins without a payment processor like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip? You're not alone. These platforms have blocked your country due to 'risk' or 'regulatory issues'. But there's a workaround: using crypto-native infrastructure. In this post, we'll explore the options and find a solution that actually works for you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are designed for global transactions, but their restrictions block creators in certain countries. They require KYC (Know Your Customer) verification, which can be a challenge in regions with limited banking infrastructure. In contrast, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect offer a more straightforward approach: no KYC, no buyer account required. They use crypto-native infrastructure to facilitate transactions, allowing buyers to pay with 300+ coins, including BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and many more.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip have strict policies on restricted countries. They often block transactions or require additional verification, which can delay or cancel sales. In contrast, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect are designed to work with restricted countries. They don't require KYC, and their automated delivery system ensures instant transactions, even in areas with limited internet connectivity.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect shine. They offer instant automated delivery, with no subscription fees or recurring costs. In contrast, PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip charge high fees, often ranging from 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction to 15% + $0.30 per transaction. With NOWPayments and Web3 Wallet Connect, you only pay a flat fee for the transaction itself, with no additional costs or hidden fees.
PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip have strict policies on restricted countries, while NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect offer a more flexible approach.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are crucial for digital creators. NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect offer instant automated delivery, with PDF receipts and no need for payment processor accounts. In contrast, PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip require manual intervention, which can lead to delays and cancellations. With NOWPayments and Web3 Wallet Connect, you can focus on creating content, while the automated system handles transactions and delivery.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

When choosing between NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, consider your specific needs. If you're looking for a more straightforward approach with no KYC or buyer account requirements, NOWPayments might be the better choice. If you need a more comprehensive solution with frontend wallet integration and multi-chain QR generation, Web3 Wallet Connect is the better option. Both options offer instant automated delivery and no subscription fees, making them ideal for digital creators in restricted countries.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect offer instant automated delivery, with no subscription fees or recurring costs.

Your Action Checklist

To start selling plugins without a payment processor, follow these steps: Set up your NOWPayments or Unchained Commerce account, Integrate Web3 Wallet Connect for frontend wallet integration and multi-chain QR generation, Create a plugin and list it on your website, Use the automated delivery system to send PDF receipts to buyers, Monitor your transactions and sales in real-time. With these steps, you can start selling plugins and earning revenue without relying on PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip.
With NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, you can start selling plugins and earning revenue in restricted countries, without relying on traditional payment processors.
